hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/saifraza/Desktop/distillery-erp/backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && npx prisma validate 2>&1 && cd /Users/saifraza/Desktop/distillery-erp/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '/[^ ]*\.tsx?'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then ISSUES=''; if grep -n ': any' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '// eslint-disable' | head -3; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: Found ': any' type usage
"; fi; if grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -3; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: Found console.log
"; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'routes/' && ! grep -q 'asyncHandler' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: Route file missing asyncHandler
"; fi; if grep -n 'findMany' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'take' | head -3; then ISSUES="${ISSUES}WARNING: findMany without take limit
"; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES"; fi; fi; fi
